body_txt: Someone shouts an order or entreaty but is suddenly forced to change their stance and start chanting the opposite. Usually a Comedy Trope , but can also be presented as a valid military tactic. The standard formula goes like this: repetition of a word or phrase; alarming change in circumstance; repetition of an inversion of the first. Or a straight reiteration of the first statement, given a humorous context by the new circumstances. For example: "Chaaaaaaarge!" ( giant rolling boulder appears ) "Retreeeeaaaat!" Commonly spoken by a Small Name, Big Ego or a Miles Gloriosus . The change of circumstance often prompts an Oh, Crap! expression. See also Verbal Backspace , On Second Thought . Tactical Withdrawal is a non-comedic variant. Can be an element of Hit-and-Run Tactics or a Defensive Feint Trap . Be Careful What You Wish For often involves this, though more long-term. Compare Punch! Punch! Punch! Uh Oh... . Contrast Attack! Attack! Attack! . May be a comedic Underequipped Charge . If the character Attack-Attacks anyway, they're probably either a Boisterous Weakling or The Neidermeyer .
